source_intake_record.raw_question_text: As shown in the figure, B is on AC, D is on CE, $AD=BD=BC$, $\angle ACE=25^\circ$, what is the degree measure of $\angle ADE$?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text:
\textbf{Solution}: Since $BD=BC$, $\angle ACE=25^\circ$,\\
hence $\angle BDC=\angle C=25^\circ$,\\
thus $\angle ABD=50^\circ$,\\
since $AD=BD$,\\
thus $\angle A=\angle ABD=50^\circ$,\\
therefore $\angle ADE=\angle A+\angle C=\boxed{75^\circ}$.

answer_present=true and registry_passed=true support downstream checking
